summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FASE H6 (HR Analytics Dashboard / BI SDM). All backend APIs working correctly with proper RBAC. Frontend dashboard renders all 6 KPI cards and charts. Period filter functionality verified. Manager access confirmed. Sales correctly blocked. Quick regression check on H5 features and core modules shows Control Tower loading without errors.

design_issues.issue: Initial load shows period 2026-08 with 0% attendance data instead of defaulting to latest period with data (2026-06)
design_issues.note: Period filter works correctly when manually changed, but default period selection could be improved

design_issues.issue: 3 'SEGERA HADIR' overlays detected on page, but they don't block BI SDM content (likely on other coming-soon menu items)
design_issues.note: BI SDM content is fully accessible and functional despite overlay detection

passed_tests: Backend: Admin GET /hr/analytics/summary (200) - all keys present (headcount, attendance, turnover, payroll, payroll_trend, overtime_trend, statutory)
Backend: Manager GET /hr/analytics/summary (200) - manager has hr.view permission
Backend: Period filter 2026-07 returns correct data
Frontend: Admin login and navigation to BI SDM successful
Frontend: All 6 KPI cards render (headcount, attendance-rate, punctuality, payroll-net, bpjs, pph21)
Frontend: All charts render (Headcount per Departemen, Komposisi Tipe Pekerja, Distribusi Kehadiran, Tren Biaya Gaji, Tren Lembur)
Frontend: Statutory & Turnover panel renders with correct data
Frontend: Period filter switches between 2026-06 and 2026-07 correctly
Frontend: Data updates when period changes (attendance 100%/56.2%, overtime shows/hides)
Frontend: Manager can access BI SDM dashboard (nav-cs-bi-hrd visible and clickable)
Frontend: Sales user does NOT see ANALITIK (BI) group (correct RBAC)
Regression: Control Tower dashboard loads without errors
Regression: HR modules accessible (Karyawan, Slip Gaji visible in sidebar)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor UX improvements possible)
